productDisplayName: John Players Men Stripes Blue Shirt
description: Style note This john players shirt gets a sartorial stamp of approval, with it's refined collar, silhouetted tailoring and it's fine, luxe fabric. Make the right impression with this shirt - be it on lazy weekends or during after-hours dinner. The best bet for semi-formal Fridays, wear this with fitted denims and ankle boots! Product Details Blue and white striped shirt, made of cotton linen blended fabric, has long sleeves, spread collar, full buttoned placket, pockets on the front, embroidered branding above the left chest pocket and a curved hem Material and Care Cotton linen blend Dry clean or machine wash with like colours only Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Trim Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
